name: scanner-axe
description: Accessibility scanner powered by axe-core, providing WCAG conformance testing via Puppeteer

configSchema.label: Browser Path
configSchema.description: Path to Chrome/Chromium binary (uses Puppeteer default if not set)

configSchema.label: Headless Mode
configSchema.description: Run the browser in headless mode

configSchema.label: Page Timeout (ms)
configSchema.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait per page

configSchema.label: WCAG Standard
configSchema.description: WCAG conformance level to test against
